payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial crop of a dark brown/black leather couch armrest and adjacent cushion in the foreground; glossy, slightly worn leather with visible seam and creasing, edge-cropped and partially occluded by a wooden tray and basket — approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.
